message:
feat(membrane): add 8 formal proofs for strict refinement, hardened safety, and deterministic replay

Implements bd-34s.1 proof obligations:

- heal.rs (4 proofs): healing never widens bounds, string truncation preserves
  null-termination room, healing counter exhaustiveness, evidence monotone
  decision IDs for deterministic replay

- config.rs (4 proofs): mode partial order (Off < Strict < Hardened), strict
  mode is glibc-compatible refinement (validates but never heals, default mode,
  env parser never enables Off), reentrant resolution returns safe default,
  mode sticky determinism for replay

Also updates build.rs barrier-map expected site count for config.rs (10→15)
to account for Ordering::SeqCst in new proof tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
